internal_anchors.note: Covered by test.js (3769 passed, 0 failed). All href=#id targets and showTab() calls verified.

tab_structure.details: test.js passed all tab structure checks. 72 WIN panels in HTML matching wins.json (73 IDs including #wins tab container is correct).

external_links.details: Sampled key data-source links: NCEI/NOAA WMM, ESA Gaia DR3, GitHub issues, funwithscience.net, llmstxt.org — all 200 OK.

data_prose_consistency.details: 72 WINs in wins.json. Build matches git HEAD (0 diff lines). test.js covers all computed count checks — 3769 passed.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 72 WIN detail panels present in HTML. All WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict fields. All prospective predictions have tldr fields.

win_dome_alignment.details: 057b and 058b are expected (ID-collision splits we add). WIN-070 (Forensic Zoom kappa=1.67 nT/uGal) appears on dome predictions page but not wins.html — referenced in ISS-2392 context. No title/claim drift detected.

build_reproducibility.details: node build.js html produces output identical to git HEAD docs/index.html (0 diff lines).

discoverability.details: docs/llms.txt, docs/sitemap.xml, docs/robots.txt all present and well-formed. All meta tags present in index.html: description, og:title, og:description, ClaimReview LD+JSON. uncounted-failures.json valid (18 entries, no dup IDs, all required fields present).

progressive_disclosure.details: All 72 WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict. All 13 genuinely prospective predictions have tldr field. test.js covers panel structure.

hardcoded_colors.details: 1 occurrence in sections.json part1.html: background:var(--surface-1,#fafafa) — CSS variable with light fallback. Only fires if --surface-1 undefined. Minor, not a direct dark-theme break.

expansion_tracker.details: next_id=538 > max_id=536 OK. No orphaned EXP-NNN.json files. Live and archive disjoint. 24 ID gaps (benign per PROP-053 classification — bulk-reservation drift; EXP-515 tracking follow-up audit script). 43 baby-orphan-ISS-NNN entries in archive (non-EXP, expected). 1 phantom entry: EXP-515 output_file points to non-existent files (see issues_found).

iss_integrity.details: No duplicate IDs in closed-issues.json. No cross-file collisions. PROP-063 retroactive dedup (29 known dupes) was fully resolved by prior decider run.

mech_a_bypass.details: ISS-2335 (fixed_by=decider-2026-05-31T12-28:EXP-467-integrated) and ISS-2376 (fixed_by=decider-2026-05-31T12-28:confirmed-in-git) both closed post-PROP-059-cutoff without verification_pattern and without matching PROP-059 exclusion patterns. Analysis: ISS-2335 is likely an EXP-integration path where PROP-059 exclusion pattern 'EXP-integrated' does not match 'EXP-467-integrated' (pattern gap). ISS-2376 is a git-confirmation path not covered by any exclusion. ISS-2403 opened. Operator verification recommended.

curmudgeon_digest.details: 0 broken review files. 4 unprocessed (EXP-462-proposal.json, SEC-7.11.c1.json, WIN-004.c8.json, WIN-058.c6.json) — within normal pipeline lag.

workspace_sync.details: No direction violations. 145 mtime-guard skips are normal (git version newer than FUSE for issue-proposal files).

fuse_staleness.details: 1 prompt file differs between FUSE and origin/main. Tracked under PROP-064. May self-resolve on next workspace-sync cycle (PROP-066 Step 4c).

workspace_only_files.details: All curmudgeon reviews, analyst expansions, and analyst JSON files present in git.

drift_audit.details: drift-audit.json is 13.7h old (under 72h gate). 3 drift candidates queued for curmudgeon.

issues_found.description: PROP-059 Mech-A-bypass audit: 2 decider-closed ISSs post-cutoff (2026-05-25T15:00Z) lack verification_pattern and don't match any PROP-059 exclusion pattern. ISS-2335 (fixed_by=decider-2026-05-31T12-28:EXP-467-integrated, EXP integration path — exclusion pattern 'EXP-integrated' does not match 'EXP-NNN-integrated' format). ISS-2376 (fixed_by=decider-2026-05-31T12-28:confirmed-in-git, git-state confirmation — no exclusion covers this path).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Operator verifies ISS-2335 (EXP-467 integrated via commit fd86767?) and ISS-2376 (WIN-003.c3.json confirmed in git). If legitimate: add audit_grandfathered field to both entries. Update PROP-059 exclusion pattern to match 'EXP-NNN-integrated' (e.g., use '-integrated' as suffix token or regex). ISS-2403 opened tracking this.

issues_found.description: EXP-515 (created 2026-05-31T09:31, completed 2026-05-31T13:40, integrated=false) has output_file='build-scripts/audit-exp-tracker-gaps.js + monitor/prompts/reference/expansion-tracker-gap-semantics.md' but neither file exists on disk. The compound '+' path suggests two output files were expected. Analyst-baby completed this EXP but files were not committed.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Locate EXP-515 output (may be in FUSE only or unwritten). If output was created, commit both files. If output was not produced, reopen EXP-515 with status=pending.

issues_found.description: monitor/prompts/reference/analyst-mode5-prospective.md differs between FUSE workspace and origin/main (md5 mismatch). PROP-066 Step 4c should propagate the git version to FUSE on next workspace-sync cycle.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Run node build.js sync-workspace from a fresh clone, or wait for next workspace-sync cycle. If staleness persists across two runs, file a tinker directive (PROP-064 regression).

issues_found.description: sections.json part1.html contains background:var(--surface-1,#fafafa) — CSS variable as primary value with #fafafa as light-theme fallback. Only triggers if --surface-1 CSS variable is undefined. Not a direct dark-theme break but worth noting.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Verify --surface-1 is defined in the site stylesheet. If defined, this is fine. If not defined, replace fallback with var(--card-bg) or var(--bg).

summary: Site is structurally sound. Build reproducibility passes (0 diff vs git HEAD). Test suite passes 3769 checks. All WIN detail panels, tab structure, internal links, and discoverability infrastructure are intact. One CRITICAL: PROP-059 Mech-A-bypass audit flagged ISS-2335 (EXP-integration path) and ISS-2376 (git-confirmation path) as missing verification_pattern — both appear to be exclusion-pattern gaps rather than genuine hallucinated closures, but operator verification is required; ISS-2403 opened. Two MODERATE: EXP-515 completed with output_file pointing to non-existent files (audit-exp-tracker-gaps.js + gap-semantics.md not found in repo), and one FUSE-stale prompt file (analyst-mode5-prospective.md) that should self-resolve on next workspace-sync cycle. Minor: one CSS variable fallback using #fafafa in sections.json. Curmudgeon pipeline healthy (0 broken files, 4 in normal lag). Workspace-sync healthy (no direction violations).
